sections.title: Travel Booking
sections.subtitle: A conversation about booking a flight to Australia

questions.question: Destination: _______
questions.explanation: She is booking a flight to Sydney.|她预订了去悉尼的航班。

questions.question: Departure date: _______ July
questions.explanation: She wants to depart on 14 July.|她想7月14日出发。

questions.question: Return date: _______ July
questions.explanation: She plans to return on 28 July.|她计划7月28日返回。

questions.question: Number of passengers: _______
questions.explanation: She is booking for two people.|她为两人预订。

questions.question: Which class does she prefer?
questions.explanation: She chooses economy class.|她选择经济舱。

questions.question: Total cost: $_______
questions.explanation: The total cost is $1800.|总费用是1800美元。

questions.question: What meal preference does she have?
questions.explanation: She requests a vegetarian meal.|她要求素食餐。

questions.question: Passport number: _______
questions.explanation: Her passport number is AB123456.|她的护照号码是AB123456。

questions.question: Seat preference: _______ seat
questions.explanation: She prefers a window seat.|她喜欢靠窗座位。

questions.question: How will she receive the ticket?
questions.explanation: The ticket will be sent by email.|机票将通过电子邮件发送。
